records.m_Talk_ENG: All your limbs have been cut. I know that this won't kill you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All your limbs have been cut. I know that this won't kill you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All your limbs have been cut. I know that this won't kill you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think about running away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think about running away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think about running away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ke... keke...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ke... keke...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ke... keke...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You laugh terribly for imitating someone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You laugh terribly for imitating someone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You laugh terribly for imitating someone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't even know who I'm imitating. Maybe the original also laughs like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't even know who I'm imitating. Maybe the original also laughs like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't even know who I'm imitating. Maybe the original also laughs like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Don't look so grim.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Don't look so grim.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Don't look so grim.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>We</color> are also irritated that we can't catch the original yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>We</color> are also irritated that we can't catch the original yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>We</color> are also irritated that we can't catch the original yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In some ways, aren't we the same in that we both can't get what we want?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In some ways, aren't we the same in that we both can't get what we want?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In some ways, aren't we the same in that we both can't get what we want?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't catch the original?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't catch the original?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't catch the original?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then does someone else have her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then does someone else have her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then does someone else have her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, that crazy whale has taken the original.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, that crazy whale has taken the original.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, that crazy whale has taken the original.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what we chose was to relieve the strong obsession we feel within our memories because the original is unobtainable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what we chose was to relieve the strong obsession we feel within our memories because the original is unobtainable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what we chose was to relieve the strong obsession we feel within our memories because the original is unobtainable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the reason why we're feeling a strong obsession to you is... probably because you are someone precious to the original, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the reason why we're feeling a strong obsession to you is... probably because you are someone precious to the original, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the reason why we're feeling a strong obsession to you is... probably because you are someone precious to the original, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a sinful woman. Getting the attention of both the C.O. and a girl who may or may not have become a C.O.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a sinful woman. Getting the attention of both the C.O. and a girl who may or may not have become a C.O.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a sinful woman. Getting the attention of both the C.O. and a girl who may or may not have become a C.O.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know why they are interested in me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know why they are interested in me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know why they are interested in me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I'm willing to answer that question if you provide the original for us instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I'm willing to answer that question if you provide the original for us instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I'm willing to answer that question if you provide the original for us instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we have nothing to talk about. No deal, Doppelganger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we have nothing to talk about. No deal, Doppelganger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we have nothing to talk about. No deal, Doppelganger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a shame. It was the best offer that I could suggest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a shame. It was the best offer that I could suggest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a shame. It was the best offer that I could suggest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, and by the way, that C.O. is going to absorb you and make you into <color=#ffd34c>our sun</color>. Did you know that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, and by the way, that C.O. is going to absorb you and make you into <color=#ffd34c>our sun</color>. Did you know that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, and by the way, that C.O. is going to absorb you and make you into <color=#ffd34c>our sun</color>. Did you know that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something about fate or whatnot. Ah hah hah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something about fate or whatnot. Ah hah hah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something about fate or whatnot. Ah hah hah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It said that it needed you to become complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It said that it needed you to become complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It said that it needed you to become complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess it still thinks it's human.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess it still thinks it's human.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess it still thinks it's human.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For me, I just want to follow my instincts and take just the original.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For me, I just want to follow my instincts and take just the original.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For me, I just want to follow my instincts and take just the original.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And not wander around like a lost dog everywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And not wander around like a lost dog everywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And not wander around like a lost dog everywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I'm trying to say is... that Doppelgangers like me have no reason to live anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I'm trying to say is... that Doppelgangers like me have no reason to live anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I'm trying to say is... that Doppelgangers like me have no reason to live anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you just destroy your core?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you just destroy your core?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you just destroy your core?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not expecting common sense from a C.O., are you? Anyway, I've told you everything I know, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not expecting common sense from a C.O., are you? Anyway, I've told you everything I know, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not expecting common sense from a C.O., are you? Anyway, I've told you everything I know, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I mean, even humans would rather bite their tongue off rather than spill the beans, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I mean, even humans would rather bite their tongue off rather than spill the beans, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I mean, even humans would rather bite their tongue off rather than spill the beans, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can't absorb my original, there really isn't a reason for me to stick around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can't absorb my original, there really isn't a reason for me to stick around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can't absorb my original, there really isn't a reason for me to stick around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, good luck trying to fight that whale with your half-empty brain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, good luck trying to fight that whale with your half-empty brain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, good luck trying to fight that whale with your half-empty brain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Absorb me to make me their sun?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Absorb me to make me their sun?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Absorb me to make me their sun?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened between you and me in the past, C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened between you and me in the past, C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened between you and me in the past, C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You caused all this just so you can absorb me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You caused all this just so you can absorb me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You caused all this just so you can absorb me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is nothing I can be certain about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is nothing I can be certain about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is nothing I can be certain about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must meet that whale again to resolve everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must meet that whale again to resolve everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must meet that whale again to resolve everything.
